pkgmetadata.longdescription: Vimb is a fast and lightweight vim-like web browser based on the webkit web browser engine and the GTK toolkit. Vimb is modal like the great vim editor and also easily configurable during runtime. Vimb is mostly keyboard-driven and does not support tabs natively (use a tabbing window manager or vimb-tabbed).

use.flag: Bundle the Dark Reader library + fixes-DB refresh cron for automatic dark theming of sites that lack native dark-mode support
